goal: Visit the provided public company website for the target company and extract a structured competitive profile. Identify the company name, homepage URL, a concise company summary, the primary market category, sector, geography, target customers, core products or services, visible differentiators, visible pricing or packaging signals, and supporting evidence URLs. Do not invent claims that are not visible on the site. Return facts that help compare stripe.com in a competitor landscape.
goal_prompt:
Visit the provided public company website for the target company and extract a structured competitive profile. Identify the company name, homepage URL, a concise company summary, the primary market category, sector, geography, target customers, core products or services, visible differentiators, visible pricing or packaging signals, and supporting evidence URLs. Do not invent claims that are not visible on the site. Return facts that help compare stripe.com in a competitor landscape.

Return only structured JSON that matches this schema exactly:
{"type":"object","required":["captured_at","company_name","homepage_url","summary","market_category","sector","geography","target_customers","products","differentiators","pricing_signals","evidence_urls"],"properties":{"captured_at":{"type":"string"},"company_name":{"type":"string"},"homepage_url":{"type":"string"},"summary":{"type":"string"},"market_category":{"type":"string"},"sector":{"type":"string"},"geography":{"type":"string"},"target_customers":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"products":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["name","category","summary"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string"},"category":{"type":"string"},"summary":{"type":"string"}}}},"differentiators":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"pricing_signals":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"evidence_urls":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}}}

Stop conditions:
["Stop after the homepage and up to two visibly linked product, solutions, or pricing pages have been reviewed.","Stop after eight relevant visible sections have been extracted.","Stop after two consecutive navigation or parsing failures."]

Structured error handling rules:
{"timeout":{"action":"retry","max_retries":2,"emit_status":"failed"},"layout_changed":{"action":"store_raw_payload","emit_status":"failed"},"schema_validation_failed":{"action":"store_raw_payload","emit_status":"validation_error"}}
stop_conditions: Stop after the homepage and up to two visibly linked product, solutions, or pricing pages have been reviewed.
Stop after eight relevant visible sections have been extracted.
Stop after two consecutive navigation or parsing failures.

result.summary: Stripe is a multinational financial services and software as a service (SaaS) company that provides payment-processing software and application programming interfaces (APIs) for e-commerce and mobile applications. It is described as building financial infrastructure for the internet.
result.geography: Global; dual-headquartered in South San Francisco, California, United States, and Dublin, Ireland.
target_customers: Enterprise businesses (e.g., Ford, Amazon, Shopify, OpenAI)

products.name: Stripe Payments
products.summary: Core API for accepting and processing online payments globally.

products.name: Stripe Billing
products.summary: Tools for managing subscriptions, recurring revenue, and usage-based billing.

products.name: Stripe Connect
products.summary: Solution for platforms and marketplaces to manage and route payments between multiple parties.

products.name: Stripe Terminal
products.summary: Hardware and software for accepting in-person payments.

products.name: Stripe Atlas
products.summary: Platform that helps startups easily incorporate as US entities and set up business banking.

products.name: Stripe Radar
products.summary: Machine learning-based anti-fraud tools to detect and block fraudulent transactions.

products.name: Stripe Treasury
products.summary: Enables platforms to embed financial services like bank accounts directly into their products.

products.name: Stripe Issuing
products.summary: Infrastructure to create and manage physical and virtual credit and debit cards.

differentiators: Developer-first approach with simple API integration (historically '9 lines of code').
Comprehensive 'Financial Infrastructure' suite that goes beyond simple payment processing into tax, identity, and banking.
Global scale and dual-region regulatory compliance (US and Europe).
Integration with advanced AI models (e.g., GPT-4) to enhance payment flows and automation.
pricing_signals: Pay-as-you-go transaction-based fee structure (standard rate typically cited as 2.9% + 30¢ per successful charge).
Custom pricing available for high-volume businesses and enterprise partners.
Tiered fees for additional services like Billing, Radar, and Tax.
